title: arenaria ciliata subsp. fugax
intro: Arenaria ciliata subsp. fugax, also known as Sandwort, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It is a perennial plant that is native to Europe and is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arenaria ciliata subsp. fugax include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions and gastrointestinal problems.
